---
title: "**Tools**"
toc: false
---

This section provides technical tools for online IRT calibration scoring.

## Interactive Scoring Workspace

Local mode:

```bash
Rscript _tools/_scripts/assess_irt_api_model.R
Rscript _tools/api/run_api.R
```

Local default API URL: `http://127.0.0.1:8088`

Live website mode requires a hosted HTTPS API endpoint. If `api-config.json` is populated, the workspace will prefill that URL automatically.

```{=html}
<style>
.tools-block {
  border-top: 1px solid #d7dee8;
  padding: 0.9rem 0 0.8rem 0;
}
.tools-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  align-items: end;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.tools-row label {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  min-width: 180px;
  gap: 0.2rem;
}
.tools-row input,
.tools-row select {
  border: 1px solid #9ba9bc;
  border-radius: 0;
  padding: 0.28rem 0.38rem;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  background: #ffffff;
}
.tools-btn {
  border: 1px solid #104872;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: #104872;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 0.38rem 0.7rem;
}
.tools-btn.secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #104872;
}
.tools-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
}
.tools-status {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  margin: 0.15rem 0 0.2rem 0;
}
.tools-status.info {
  color: #4d5d73;
}
.tools-status.ok {
  color: #165b38;
}
.tools-status.error {
  color: #8c1e1e;
}
.tools-note {
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  color: #4d5d73;
}
.items-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
}
.items-grid label {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  gap: 0.2rem;
}
.items-grid select {
  border: 1px solid #9ba9bc;
  border-radius: 0;
  padding: 0.24rem 0.32rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  background: #ffffff;
}
.tools-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.89rem;
}
.tools-table th,
.tools-table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #dde4ed;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.42rem;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.tools-subhead {
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
}
</style>

<div class="tools-block">
  <div class="tools-row">
    <label for="apiBaseUrl">
      <strong>API Base URL</strong>
      <input id="apiBaseUrl" type="text" value="" placeholder="Resolved automatically" />
    </label>
    <label for="apiToken">
      <strong>API Key (Bearer token)</strong>
      <input id="apiToken" type="password" placeholder="Optional" />
    </label>
    <button id="btnCheckHealth" class="tools-btn secondary" type="button">Check Connection</button>
    <button id="btnLoadEngines" class="tools-btn" type="button">Load Engines</button>
  </div>
  <div id="apiStatus" class="tools-status info">Not connected.</div>
  <div class="tools-note">If API key auth is enabled, provide the token above.</div>
  <div id="apiModeNote" class="tools-note"></div>
</div>

<div class="tools-block">
  <div class="tools-row">
    <label for="engineSelect">
      <strong>Scoring Engine</strong>
      <select id="engineSelect"></select>
    </label>
    <div id="engineMeta" class="tools-note">Load engines to inspect factor and cutoff mode.</div>
  </div>
  <div id="requiredColumns" class="tools-note"></div>
</div>

<h3 class="tools-subhead">Single Participant</h3>

<div class="tools-block">
  <div id="singleItemsGrid" class="items-grid"></div>
  <div class="tools-row">
    <label for="singleSex">
      <strong>Sex</strong>
      <select id="singleSex">
        <option value=""></option>
        <option value="Female">Female</option>
        <option value="Male">Male</option>
      </select>
    </label>
    <label for="singleAge">
      <strong>Age</strong>
      <input id="singleAge" type="number" min="0" max="120" step="1" />
    </label>
    <label for="singleAgeGrp">
      <strong>Age Group</strong>
      <input id="singleAgeGrp" type="text" placeholder="e.g., 13-17" />
    </label>
    <label for="singleSexAgeGrp">
      <strong>Sex + Age Group</strong>
      <input id="singleSexAgeGrp" type="text" placeholder="e.g., Female_13-17" />
    </label>
    <button id="btnScoreSingle" class="tools-btn" type="button">Score Single</button>
    <button id="btnLoadExample" class="tools-btn secondary" type="button">Load Example</button>
  </div>
  <div id="singleStatus" class="tools-status info"></div>
  <div id="singleOutput"></div>
</div>

<h3 class="tools-subhead">Batch Scoring</h3>

<div class="tools-block">
  <div class="tools-row">
    <label for="batchFile">
      <strong>Upload CSV or JSON</strong>
      <input id="batchFile" type="file" accept=".csv,.json" />
    </label>
    <button id="btnScoreBatch" class="tools-btn" type="button">Score Batch</button>
    <button id="btnDownloadTemplate" class="tools-btn secondary" type="button">Download Template CSV</button>
    <button id="btnDownloadBatch" class="tools-btn secondary" type="button" disabled>Download Scored CSV</button>
  </div>
  <div id="batchHint" class="tools-note"></div>
  <div id="batchStatus" class="tools-status info"></div>
  <div id="batchOutput"></div>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const DEFAULT_ITEMS = [
    "SSQ01", "SSQ02", "SSQ03", "SSQ08", "SSQ09",
    "SSQ10", "SSQ11", "SSQ12", "SSQ13", "SSQ14"
  ];
  const LOCAL_DEFAULT_API = "http://127.0.0.1:8088";

  const state = {
    engines: [],
    selectedItems: DEFAULT_ITEMS.slice(),
    batchOutput: [],
    publicConfig: {}
  };

  function firstValue(value) {
    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
      if (value.length === 0) return null;
      if (value.length === 1) return value[0];
      return value;
    }
    return value;
  }

  function asArray(value) {
    const out = firstValue(value);
    if (out == null) return [];
    return Array.isArray(out) ? out : [out];
  }

  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value)
      .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
      .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
      .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
      .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
      .replace(/'/g, "&#039;");
  }

  function formatValue(value) {
    if (value == null) return "";
    if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) {
      return value.toFixed(4).replace(/\.?0+$/, "");
    }
    return String(value);
  }

  function setStatus(id, message, type = "info") {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    el.textContent = message;
    el.className = `tools-status ${type}`;
  }

  function setScoringEnabled(enabled) {
    document.getElementById("engineSelect").disabled = !enabled;
    document.getElementById("btnScoreSingle").disabled = !enabled;
    document.getElementById("btnLoadExample").disabled = !enabled;
    document.getElementById("btnScoreBatch").disabled = !enabled;
    document.getElementById("btnDownloadTemplate").disabled = !enabled;
    if (!enabled) {
      document.getElementById("btnDownloadBatch").disabled = true;
    }
  }

  function apiBase() {
    const input = document.getElementById("apiBaseUrl");
    return input.value.trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
  }

  function apiToken() {
    const input = document.getElementById("apiToken");
    return input.value.trim();
  }

  function isLocalPage() {
    const host = window.location.hostname;
    return host === "127.0.0.1" || host === "localhost";
  }

  function normalizeApiUrl(value) {
    return String(value || "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
  }

  function queryApiUrl() {
    try {
      const value = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("api");
      return normalizeApiUrl(value);
    } catch (_error) {
      return "";
    }
  }

  async function loadPublicConfig() {
    try {
      const configUrl = new URL("../api-config.json", window.location.href);
      const response = await fetch(configUrl.toString(), { cache: "no-store" });
      if (!response.ok) return {};
      const data = await response.json();
      return typeof data === "object" && data !== null ? data : {};
    } catch (_error) {
      return {};
    }
  }

  function resolveInitialApiUrl(savedUrl) {
    const fromQuery = queryApiUrl();
    if (fromQuery) return fromQuery;

    const fromSaved = normalizeApiUrl(savedUrl);
    if (fromSaved) return fromSaved;

    const fromConfig = normalizeApiUrl(state.publicConfig.api_base_url);
    if (fromConfig) return fromConfig;

    if (isLocalPage()) return LOCAL_DEFAULT_API;
    return "";
  }

  function updateApiModeNote() {
    const el = document.getElementById("apiModeNote");
    const base = apiBase();

    if (!base) {
      if (isLocalPage()) {
        el.textContent = "Local page detected. Start the API in a separate terminal to connect automatically.";
      } else {
        el.textContent = "Live page detected. Enter a hosted HTTPS API URL or publish one in api-config.json.";
      }
      return;
    }

    if (window.location.protocol === "https:" && base.startsWith("http://")) {
      el.textContent = "This HTTPS page cannot call an HTTP API. Use a hosted HTTPS API URL.";
      return;
    }

    if (base.startsWith("http://127.0.0.1") || base.startsWith("http://localhost")) {
      el.textContent = "Local API target selected. Leave API key blank unless you explicitly enabled Bearer auth.";
      return;
    }

    el.textContent = "Hosted API target selected.";
  }

  function connectionHint(base) {
    if (!base) {
      return "Enter an API URL first.";
    }
    if (base.startsWith("http://127.0.0.1") || base.startsWith("http://localhost")) {
      return "Ensure `Rscript _tools/api/run_api.R` is running in a separate terminal.";
    }
    return "Confirm the hosted API is reachable and allows this site origin.";
  }

  function loadSavedSettings() {
    let savedUrl = "";
    try {
      savedUrl = window.localStorage.getItem("columinate_api_base_url") || "";
      const savedToken = window.localStorage.getItem("columinate_api_token");
      if (savedToken) document.getElementById("apiToken").value = savedToken;
    } catch (_error) {
      // no-op
    }
    document.getElementById("apiBaseUrl").value = resolveInitialApiUrl(savedUrl);
    updateApiModeNote();
  }

  function persistSettings() {
    try {
      window.localStorage.setItem("columinate_api_base_url", apiBase());
      window.localStorage.setItem("columinate_api_token", apiToken());
    } catch (_error) {
      // no-op
    }
  }

  function validateApiUrl() {
    const base = apiBase();
    if (!base) {
      throw new Error("API Base URL is required.");
    }
    if (window.location.protocol === "https:" && base.startsWith("http://")) {
      throw new Error(
        "HTTPS page cannot call an HTTP API URL. Use an HTTPS API URL or run the site locally."
      );
    }
    return base;
  }

  function normalizeError(data, status) {
    const err = firstValue(data?.error) || `HTTP ${status}`;
    const details = firstValue(data?.details);
    if (details == null || details === "") return err;
    if (typeof details === "object") return `${err}: ${JSON.stringify(details)}`;
    return `${err}: ${details}`;
  }

  async function fetchJson(path, options = {}) {
    const base = validateApiUrl();
    const opts = { ...options };
    opts.headers = { ...(options.headers || {}) };
    const token = apiToken();
    if (token && !opts.headers.Authorization) {
      opts.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
    }
    if (opts.body && !opts.headers["Content-Type"]) {
      opts.headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json";
    }

    let response;
    try {
      response = await fetch(`${base}${path}`, opts);
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error(`${error.message}. ${connectionHint(base)}`);
    }
    const text = await response.text();
    let data = {};

    if (text) {
      try {
        data = JSON.parse(text);
      } catch (_error) {
        throw new Error(`Non-JSON response from ${path}.`);
      }
    }

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(normalizeError(data, response.status));
    }
    return data;
  }

  function normalizeEngine(raw) {
    return {
      engineId: String(firstValue(raw.engine_id) || ""),
      items: asArray(raw.items).map((x) => String(firstValue(x))),
      nFactors: Number(firstValue(raw.n_factors)),
      cutoffMode: String(firstValue(raw.cutoff_apply_mode) || "none")
    };
  }

  function selectedEngineId() {
    return document.getElementById("engineSelect").value;
  }

  function renderSingleItemInputs(items) {
    const container = document.getElementById("singleItemsGrid");
    container.innerHTML = "";

    items.forEach((item) => {
      const label = document.createElement("label");
      label.setAttribute("for", `single_${item}`);
      label.innerHTML = `<strong>${escapeHtml(item)}</strong>`;

      const select = document.createElement("select");
      select.id = `single_${item}`;
      [
        { value: "", label: "" },
        { value: "0", label: "0" },
        { value: "1", label: "1" },
        { value: "2", label: "2" },
        { value: "3", label: "3" },
        { value: "4", label: "4" }
      ].forEach((optionDef) => {
        const option = document.createElement("option");
        option.value = optionDef.value;
        option.textContent = optionDef.label;
        select.appendChild(option);
      });

      label.appendChild(select);
      container.appendChild(label);
    });
  }

  function applyEngine(engineId) {
    const engine = state.engines.find((x) => x.engineId === engineId);
    const items = engine && engine.items.length > 0 ? engine.items : DEFAULT_ITEMS.slice();
    state.selectedItems = items;
    renderSingleItemInputs(items);

    if (engine) {
      const factors = Number.isFinite(engine.nFactors) ? engine.nFactors : "NA";
      document.getElementById("engineMeta").textContent =
        `Factors: ${factors} | Cutoff mode: ${engine.cutoffMode}`;
    } else {
      document.getElementById("engineMeta").textContent =
        "Engine metadata not available.";
    }

    document.getElementById("requiredColumns").innerHTML =
      `<strong>Required batch columns:</strong> ${items.join(", ")}.`;
    document.getElementById("batchHint").textContent =
      "Optional columns: SEX, AGE, AGEGRP, SEX_AGEGRP.";
  }

  function normalizeSingleOutput(output) {
    if (output == null) return {};
    if (Array.isArray(output)) {
      if (output.length === 1 && typeof output[0] === "object") {
        return normalizeSingleOutput(output[0]);
      }
      return {};
    }

    if (typeof output === "object") {
      const out = {};
      Object.entries(output).forEach(([key, val]) => {
        if (key === "_row") return;
        out[key] = Array.isArray(val) && val.length === 1 ? val[0] : val;
      });
      return out;
    }

    return { result: output };
  }

  function renderSingleOutput(payload) {
    const container = document.getElementById("singleOutput");
    const entries = Object.entries(payload || {});

    if (entries.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = "<div class='tools-note'>No score output.</div>";
      return;
    }

    let html = "<" + "table class='tools-table'><thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Value</th></tr></thead><tbody>";
    entries.forEach(([k, v]) => {
      html += `<tr><td>${escapeHtml(k)}</td><td>${escapeHtml(formatValue(v))}</td></tr>`;
    });
    html += "</tbody></" + "table>";
    container.innerHTML = html;
  }

  function parseCsvLine(line) {
    const out = [];
    let current = "";
    let inQuotes = false;

    for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i += 1) {
      const char = line[i];
      if (char === "\"") {
        if (inQuotes && line[i + 1] === "\"") {
          current += "\"";
          i += 1;
        } else {
          inQuotes = !inQuotes;
        }
      } else if (char === "," && !inQuotes) {
        out.push(current);
        current = "";
      } else {
        current += char;
      }
    }
    out.push(current);
    return out;
  }

  function parseCsv(text) {
    const lines = text
      .split(/\r?\n/)
      .map((x) => x.trim())
      .filter((x) => x.length > 0);

    if (lines.length < 2) {
      throw new Error("CSV must include a header row and at least one data row.");
    }

    const headers = parseCsvLine(lines[0]).map((x) => x.trim());
    return lines.slice(1).map((line) => {
      const values = parseCsvLine(line);
      const row = {};
      headers.forEach((header, idx) => {
        row[header] = values[idx] === undefined ? "" : values[idx];
      });
      return row;
    });
  }

  function toUpperSet(records) {
    const set = new Set();
    records.forEach((row) => {
      Object.keys(row).forEach((k) => set.add(k.trim().toUpperCase()));
    });
    return set;
  }

  function getIgnoreCase(row, target) {
    const targetUpper = target.toUpperCase();
    const key = Object.keys(row).find((k) => k.trim().toUpperCase() === targetUpper);
    return key === undefined ? undefined : row[key];
  }

  function normalizeBatchInput(records) {
    const covariates = ["SEX", "AGE", "AGEGRP", "SEX_AGEGRP"];
    return records.map((row) => {
      const out = {};
      state.selectedItems.forEach((item) => {
        const value = getIgnoreCase(row, item);
        out[item] = value === undefined || value === "" ? null : value;
      });
      covariates.forEach((key) => {
        const value = getIgnoreCase(row, key);
        if (value !== undefined && value !== "") out[key] = value;
      });
      return out;
    });
  }

  function normalizeRow(row) {
    const out = {};
    Object.entries(row || {}).forEach(([key, val]) => {
      if (key === "_row") return;
      out[key] = Array.isArray(val) && val.length === 1 ? val[0] : val;
    });
    return out;
  }

  function normalizeBatchOutput(output) {
    if (output == null) return [];
    if (Array.isArray(output)) return output.map(normalizeRow);

    if (typeof output === "object") {
      const keys = Object.keys(output);
      if (keys.length === 0) return [];

      const first = output[keys[0]];
      if (Array.isArray(first)) {
        const n = first.length;
        const rows = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < n; i += 1) {
          const row = {};
          keys.forEach((key) => {
            const value = output[key];
            row[key] = Array.isArray(value) ? value[i] : value;
          });
          rows.push(normalizeRow(row));
        }
        return rows;
      }
      return [normalizeRow(output)];
    }
    return [];
  }

  function renderBatchOutput(rows) {
    const container = document.getElementById("batchOutput");
    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = "<div class='tools-note'>No batch output.</div>";
      return;
    }

    const columns = Array.from(
      rows.reduce((acc, row) => {
        Object.keys(row).forEach((key) => acc.add(key));
        return acc;
      }, new Set())
    );

    const preview = rows.slice(0, 25);
    let html = "<" + "table class='tools-table'><thead><tr>";
    columns.forEach((col) => {
      html += `<th>${escapeHtml(col)}</th>`;
    });
    html += "</tr></thead><tbody>";

    preview.forEach((row) => {
      html += "<tr>";
      columns.forEach((col) => {
        html += `<td>${escapeHtml(formatValue(row[col]))}</td>`;
      });
      html += "</tr>";
    });
    html += "</tbody></" + "table>";

    if (rows.length > preview.length) {
      html += `<div class='tools-note'>Preview showing ${preview.length} of ${rows.length} rows.</div>`;
    }

    container.innerHTML = html;
  }

  function toCsv(rows) {
    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) return "";
    const columns = Array.from(
      rows.reduce((acc, row) => {
        Object.keys(row).forEach((key) => acc.add(key));
        return acc;
      }, new Set())
    );

    const escape = (value) => {
      if (value == null) return "";
      const text = String(value);
      if (/[",\n]/.test(text)) {
        return `"${text.replace(/"/g, "\"\"")}"`;
      }
      return text;
    };

    const lines = [columns.join(",")];
    rows.forEach((row) => {
      lines.push(columns.map((col) => escape(row[col])).join(","));
    });
    return lines.join("\n");
  }

  function collectSinglePayload() {
    const payload = {
      engine_id: selectedEngineId(),
      responses: {}
    };

    state.selectedItems.forEach((item) => {
      const input = document.getElementById(`single_${item}`);
      const value = input.value.trim();
      payload.responses[item] = value === "" ? null : Number(value);
    });

    const sex = document.getElementById("singleSex").value.trim();
    const age = document.getElementById("singleAge").value.trim();
    const agegrp = document.getElementById("singleAgeGrp").value.trim();
    const sexAgegrp = document.getElementById("singleSexAgeGrp").value.trim();

    if (sex) payload.sex = sex;
    if (age) payload.age = Number(age);
    if (agegrp) payload.agegrp = agegrp;
    if (sexAgegrp) payload.sex_agegrp = sexAgegrp;

    return payload;
  }

  async function checkHealth() {
    persistSettings();
    updateApiModeNote();
    setStatus("apiStatus", "Checking API connection...", "info");
    try {
      const response = await fetchJson("/health");
      const n = Number(firstValue(response.engines_loaded) || 0);
      setStatus("apiStatus", `API online. Engines loaded: ${n}.`, "ok");
    } catch (error) {
      setStatus("apiStatus", `Connection failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
    }
  }

  async function loadEngines() {
    persistSettings();
    updateApiModeNote();
    setStatus("apiStatus", "Loading engines...", "info");
    try {
      const response = await fetchJson("/engines");
      const engines = Array.isArray(response.engines) ? response.engines : [];
      state.engines = engines.map(normalizeEngine).filter((x) => x.engineId.length > 0);

      const select = document.getElementById("engineSelect");
      select.innerHTML = "";

      state.engines.forEach((engine) => {
        const option = document.createElement("option");
        option.value = engine.engineId;
        option.textContent = engine.engineId;
        select.appendChild(option);
      });

      if (state.engines.length === 0) {
        applyEngine("");
        setScoringEnabled(false);
        setStatus("apiStatus", "No engines returned by API.", "error");
        return;
      }

      const preferred = String(firstValue(response.default_engine_id) || state.engines[0].engineId);
      if (state.engines.some((x) => x.engineId === preferred)) {
        select.value = preferred;
      } else {
        select.value = state.engines[0].engineId;
      }

      applyEngine(select.value);
      setScoringEnabled(true);
      setStatus("apiStatus", `Connected. Loaded ${state.engines.length} engines.`, "ok");
    } catch (error) {
      setScoringEnabled(false);
      setStatus("apiStatus", `Load failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
    }
  }

  function loadSingleExample() {
    state.selectedItems.forEach((item, idx) => {
      const input = document.getElementById(`single_${item}`);
      if (input) {
        input.value = idx % 2 === 0 ? "1" : "0";
      }
    });
    document.getElementById("singleSex").value = "Female";
    document.getElementById("singleAge").value = "19";
    document.getElementById("singleAgeGrp").value = "18-24";
    document.getElementById("singleSexAgeGrp").value = "Female_18-24";
    setStatus("singleStatus", "Example values loaded.", "info");
  }

  async function scoreSingle() {
    setStatus("singleStatus", "Scoring single participant...", "info");
    try {
      const payload = collectSinglePayload();
      const response = await fetchJson("/score/single", {
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      });
      renderSingleOutput(normalizeSingleOutput(response.output));
      setStatus("singleStatus", "Single score completed.", "ok");
    } catch (error) {
      setStatus("singleStatus", `Scoring failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
    }
  }

  async function readBatchRecords() {
    const fileInput = document.getElementById("batchFile");
    if (!fileInput.files || fileInput.files.length === 0) {
      throw new Error("Select a CSV or JSON file.");
    }

    const file = fileInput.files[0];
    const name = file.name.toLowerCase();
    const text = await file.text();

    if (name.endsWith(".json")) {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
      if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return parsed;
      if (parsed && Array.isArray(parsed.records)) return parsed.records;
      throw new Error("JSON must be an array of records or include `records`.");
    }
    return parseCsv(text);
  }

  async function scoreBatch() {
    setStatus("batchStatus", "Reading batch file...", "info");
    try {
      const records = await readBatchRecords();
      if (!Array.isArray(records) || records.length === 0) {
        throw new Error("No records found in the uploaded file.");
      }

      const availableColumns = toUpperSet(records);
      const missing = state.selectedItems.filter(
        (item) => !availableColumns.has(item.toUpperCase())
      );
      if (missing.length > 0) {
        throw new Error(`Missing required columns: ${missing.join(", ")}`);
      }

      setStatus("batchStatus", "Scoring batch...", "info");
      const payload = {
        engine_id: selectedEngineId(),
        records: normalizeBatchInput(records)
      };

      const response = await fetchJson("/score/batch", {
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      });

      const rows = normalizeBatchOutput(response.output);
      state.batchOutput = rows;
      renderBatchOutput(rows);
      document.getElementById("btnDownloadBatch").disabled = rows.length === 0;
      setStatus("batchStatus", `Batch score completed for ${rows.length} records.`, "ok");
    } catch (error) {
      document.getElementById("btnDownloadBatch").disabled = true;
      setStatus("batchStatus", `Batch scoring failed: ${error.message}`, "error");
    }
  }

  function downloadBatchCsv() {
    if (!state.batchOutput || state.batchOutput.length === 0) return;
    const csv = toCsv(state.batchOutput);
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: "text/csv;charset=utf-8;" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    link.href = url;
    link.download = "irt_scored_output.csv";
    document.body.appendChild(link);
    link.click();
    link.remove();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }

  function downloadTemplateCsv() {
    const row = {};
    state.selectedItems.forEach((item) => {
      row[item] = "";
    });
    row.SEX = "";
    row.AGE = "";
    row.AGEGRP = "";
    row.SEX_AGEGRP = "";

    const csv = toCsv([row]);
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: "text/csv;charset=utf-8;" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    link.href = url;
    link.download = "irt_batch_template.csv";
    document.body.appendChild(link);
    link.click();
    link.remove();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }

  async function initialize() {
    state.publicConfig = await loadPublicConfig();
    loadSavedSettings();
    renderSingleItemInputs(DEFAULT_ITEMS);
    applyEngine("");
    setScoringEnabled(false);

    document.getElementById("btnCheckHealth").addEventListener("click", checkHealth);
    document.getElementById("btnLoadEngines").addEventListener("click", loadEngines);
    document.getElementById("apiBaseUrl").addEventListener("change", () => {
      persistSettings();
      updateApiModeNote();
      setScoringEnabled(false);
      setStatus("apiStatus", "API URL changed. Click Load Engines.", "info");
    });
    document.getElementById("apiToken").addEventListener("change", persistSettings);
    document.getElementById("engineSelect").addEventListener("change", (event) => {
      applyEngine(event.target.value);
    });
    document.getElementById("btnScoreSingle").addEventListener("click", scoreSingle);
    document.getElementById("btnLoadExample").addEventListener("click", loadSingleExample);
    document.getElementById("btnScoreBatch").addEventListener("click", scoreBatch);
    document.getElementById("btnDownloadTemplate").addEventListener("click", downloadTemplateCsv);
    document.getElementById("btnDownloadBatch").addEventListener("click", downloadBatchCsv);

    if (!apiBase()) {
      setStatus(
        "apiStatus",
        isLocalPage()
          ? "API not connected yet. Start the local API, then click Load Engines."
          : "Enter a hosted HTTPS API URL, then click Load Engines.",
        "info"
      );
      return;
    }

    if (window.location.protocol === "https:" && apiBase().startsWith("http://")) {
      setStatus("apiStatus", "Current API URL is HTTP. Enter a hosted HTTPS API URL.", "error");
      return;
    }

    loadEngines();
  }

  initialize();
})();
</script>
```

## Model Capability Snapshot

This snapshot is generated from `_tools/_objects/irt_api_assessment.rds`.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

assessment_path <- "_tools/_objects/irt_api_assessment.rds"

if (!file.exists(assessment_path)) {
  cat("Assessment object not found. Run `Rscript _tools/_scripts/assess_irt_api_model.R` first.")
} else {
  assessment <- readRDS(assessment_path)
  cat(
    paste0(
      "- Engines available: ", assessment$n_engines, "\n",
      "- Required SSQ items: ", paste(assessment$input_items, collapse = ", "), "\n",
      "- Optional grouping covariates: ", paste(assessment$optional_covariates, collapse = ", "), "\n",
      "- Scoring outputs: ", paste(assessment$outputs, collapse = ", "), "\n\n"
    )
  )

  engine_cols <- c(
    "engine_id", "n_factors", "cutoff_apply_mode",
    "overall_cutoff_theta", "overall_accuracy",
    "overall_sensitivity", "overall_specificity"
  )
  engines <- assessment$engines[, engine_cols, drop = FALSE]
  names(engines) <- c(
    "Engine", "Factors", "Cutoff Mode", "Theta Cutoff",
    "Accuracy", "Sensitivity", "Specificity"
  )

  knitr::kable(engines, digits = 3)
}
```

## API Endpoints

1. `GET /health`
2. `GET /engines`
3. `GET /contract`
4. `POST /score/single`
5. `POST /score/batch`

Core files:

1. `_tools/api/plumber.R`
2. `_tools/api/run_api.R`
3. `_tools/api/CONTRACT.md`
4. `_tools/_scripts/assess_irt_api_model.R`

## HTTPS Deployment Files

1. `_tools/api/Dockerfile`
2. `_tools/api/.env.example`
3. `_tools/api/DEPLOYMENT.md`
4. `_tools/api/scoring_runtime.R`
5. `_tools/_scripts/prepare_api_deploy_bundle.R`

Prepare deploy bundle and run local container test:

```bash
Rscript _tools/_scripts/prepare_api_deploy_bundle.R
docker build -f _tools/api/Dockerfile -t columinate-irt-api ..
docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file _tools/api/.env.example columinate-irt-api
```
